ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., float, integer) */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the training data belongs to */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the training data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the training data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the performance metric belongs to */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank (e.g., superkingdom, phylum, class) */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model at the taxonomic rank */,
  "precision_stdev" REAL /* Standard deviation of precision */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model at the taxonomic rank */,
  "recall_stdev" REAL /* Standard deviation of recall */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model at the taxonomic rank */,
  "misclassification_rate" REAL /* Misclassification rate of the model at the taxonomic rank */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model at the taxonomic rank */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_taxonomic_rank FOREIGN KEY ("taxonomic_rank") REFERENCES taxonomic_ranks ("rank_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomic rank (e.g., superkingdom, phylum, class) */,
  "rank_description" TEXT /* Description of the taxonomic rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_models" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the model (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation_history" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who evaluated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_history_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
